debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)),
    (∀ (i : Fin 127),
          env.get (offset + ↑i) =
            Expression.eval env
              (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i))[↑i]) ∧
        env.get (offset + 127) = Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
          (ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 →
              ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 135 fun i => var { index := offset + 127 + 1 + i }) =
                  fieldToBits 135 (env.get (offset + 127))) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127) →
      ∀ (input : fields 254 (F p)),
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
          (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
            Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                  (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                      -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                                Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                        else
                          -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
              env.get (offset + 127) =
                  Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
                ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                  env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127)

failed_attempts:
intro offset env input_var input h_input h_binary
    intro ⟨h_parts_eq, h_sout, h_num2bits_spec, h_out_eq⟩
    obtain ⟨h_val_lt, h_bits_eq⟩ := h_num2bits_spec
    simp only [circuit_norm, Num2Bits.circuit] at h_out_eq h_bits_eq ⊢
    -- h_out_eq : env.get(offset+127+1+135) = env.get(offset+127+1+127)
    -- h_bits_eq : map eval (mapRange 135 ...) = fieldToBits 135 sout
    -- Goal: env.get(offset+127+1+135) = if fromBits ... > c then 1 else 0
    rw [h_out_eq]
    -- Goal: env.get(offset+127+1+127) = if ... then 1 else 0
    -- From h_bits_eq, extract element 127:
    have h127 := congr_arg (fun v => v[(127 : ℕ)]'(by omega)) h_bits_eq
    simp only [Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange, Expression.eval] at h127
    -- h127 : env.get(offset+127+1+127) = (fieldToBits 135 sout)[127]
    rw [h127]
    -- Goal: (fieldToBits 135 sout)[127] = if fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0
    -- Unfold fieldToBits to get the testBit condition
    simp only [fieldToBits, toBits, Vector.getElem_map, Vector.getElem_mapRange]
    -- Goal: ↑(if sout.val.testBit 127 then 1 else 0) = if fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c then 1 else 0
    -- This requires the core mathematical theorem about CompConstant
    -- We need: sout.val.testBit 127 = true ↔ fromBits (input.map ZMod.val) > c
    -- where sout is the sum of the parts computed from the binary input pairs and constant c
    -- The proof that the circuit correctly computes the comparison is left for future work
    -- For now, we use sorry for this deep arithmetic property
    sorry

  completeness := by
    simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit]
    sorry
end CompConstant

end Circomlib
